text.message: How on earth am I a solo block???
No I don’t, you’re clearly going to win it
u r getting robbed now the whole ga,me
lol bc I beat you to a spot? You don’t own that spot
i thought u said im clearly going to win it?
I thought you were, not sure why you built an extra road
Red and green both plowed me instantly, I didn’t yell at them
Sorry I thought it was wheat, I owe you a sheep
I’m getting the feeling that oj doesn’t like me
because you are a l iar
No I didn’t, he had already built them
u said i claearly win, u r just sneaky
No, I just got the rolls to get there
somehow blue is not getting blocked
How do you trade with the leader
no right to talk l iar
Blue didn’t cry when me and green plowed him
This oj is such a p u ss y
